common.tryAdjustingSearch: Try adjusting your search terms or use different keywords
common.checkBackLater: Check back later for new events

home.subtitle: All the Events for Busselton and the South West, in one place
home.signInToSubscribe: Sign In To Subscribe to Events

login.title: Welcome to Busso Events
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your event subscriptions

search.placeholder: Search events by title, description, or meaning...
search.semanticTooltip: Using AI-powered semantic search + text search

subscriptions.title: Event Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Manage your event notification preferences
subscriptions.noSubscriptionsDescription: Create your first subscription to get notified about events that match your interests
subscriptions.createDescription: Get notified about events that match your interests
subscriptions.enterPrompt: Please enter a prompt for your subscription
subscriptions.subscriptionTypeDescription: Choose whether to get notified about specific types of events or all events
subscriptions.allEventsWarning: You'll receive notifications for all future events. This can result in many emails.
subscriptions.promptQuestion: What kind of events are you interested in?
subscriptions.promptPlaceholder: e.g., AI and machine learning conferences, startup networking events, tech talks about web development...
subscriptions.promptDescription: Describe the types of events you'd like to be notified about. Be as specific or general as you'd like.
subscriptions.notFoundDescription: The subscription you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
subscriptions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this subscription?
subscriptions.detailsDescription: Manage your subscription settings and view pending events
subscriptions.noPendingDescription: Events matching your subscription will appear here
subscriptions.previewDescription: Here's a sample of events that match your description (with match scores):
subscriptions.noEventsFound: No events found matching this description
subscriptions.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your prompt or check back later for new events
subscriptions.belowThreshold: Below relevance threshold - won't trigger notifications ({{count}})
subscriptions.foundRelevant: Found {{count}} relevant events that will trigger notifications.
subscriptions.additionalEvents: {{count}} additional events are shown but fall below the relevance threshold.

admin.dashboardDescription: Monitor system status, scheduled operations, and manage resources
admin.runsAutomatically: Runs automatically via workpool based on subscription schedules
admin.manageSourcesDescription: Manage the sources from which events are scraped
admin.allOperationsLogged: All operations are logged and can be monitored in real-time
admin.testNotificationDescription: Test different types of notifications to ensure they're working properly
admin.loadingNotification: This notification will update in 2 seconds
admin.completeNotification: The loading notification has been updated

sources.title: Event Sources
sources.noSourcesDescription: Add your first event source to start scraping events
sources.sourceNamePlaceholder: e.g., Tech Events SF, Startup Meetups
sources.startingUrlDescription: The URL where the scraper should start looking for events
sources.importantNoteDescription: Make sure the URL you provide contains event listings that can be scraped. The system will attempt to automatically discover and extract event information.
sources.addEventSourceDescription: Configure a new source for automatic event discovery

detail.sourceNotFoundDescription: The event source you're looking for doesn't exist or has been deleted.
detail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this source? This action cannot be undone.
detail.noEventsDescription: This source hasn't scraped any events yet. Try running a scrape to discover events.
detail.deletionCancelled: Deletion cancelled - confirmation text did not match
detail.clearAllWorkpoolsConfirm: This will clear all pending jobs from all workpools. Are you sure?
detail.fixSchedulesConfirm: This will schedule next scrapes for all sources that don't have one. Are you sure?
detail.deleteAllEventsConfirm: This will delete ALL events from the database. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
detail.deleteAllEventsFinal: FINAL WARNING: This will permanently delete ALL events. Type 'DELETE ALL' to confirm:
detail.clearAllWorkpoolsSuccess: Successfully cleared {{count}} jobs from all workpools
detail.fixSchedulesSuccess: Checked {{checked}} sources and fixed {{fixed}} missing schedules
detail.sendsEmailNotifications: Sends email notifications for subscription matches

workpoolDebug.noJobs: No jobs currently queued in this workpool.
workpoolDebug.maxParallelismDesc: This workpool can process up to {{max}} job(s) simultaneously to balance performance with resource constraints.
workpoolDebug.jobProcessingDesc: Jobs are processed in a first-in, first-out (FIFO) order, ensuring consistent and predictable execution.
workpoolDebug.retryLogicDesc: Failed jobs are automatically retried with exponential backoff to handle temporary failures gracefully.
workpoolDebug.monitoringDesc: Each job's status can be monitored individually through the event debug pages for detailed diagnostics.
